description: Post a comment on a pull request (creates a new general discussion thread) or on a work item (discussion comment).

resource.description: Whether to comment on a pull request thread or a work item.

organization.description: Azure DevOps organization name when required by the configured API URL (see pull_request_read).

repository.description: Repository name or ID (required for pull_request).

body.description: Comment text (Markdown supported by Azure DevOps where applicable).
